mapper.select: SELECT SCHEDULE_ID AS scheduleId, USER_ID AS userId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS endDate, ALL_DAY AS allDay, TO_CHAR(REGDTE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdte, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt FROM FFG_SCHEDULE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY START_DATE ASC

SELECT SCHEDULE_ID AS scheduleId, USER_ID AS userId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS endDate, ALL_DAY AS allDay, TO_CHAR(REGDTE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdte, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt FROM FFG_SCHEDULE WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FFG_SCHEDULE ( SCHEDULE_ID, USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, START_DATE, END_DATE, ALL_DAY, REGDTE, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( FFG_SCHEDULE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), #{allDay}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE FFG_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, START_DATE = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), END_DATE = TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), ALL_DAY = #{allDay}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
